desc: In this tiny two-file arithmetic library (src/), src/parser.js is a recursive-descent evaluator that consumes the token stream produced by src/lexer.js. Every parse currently throws because the parser's peekKind() helper reads the wrong field off each token. The correct field name is defined by the lexer's token contract — read src/lexer.js to learn the token object shape, then fix src/parser.js so tests/parser.test.ts passes.
